name: Attio
description: A modern CRM and workspace for managing relationships, contacts, and company data with a programmable API.

auth_methods.note: The official Authentication reference page (meta/description) states Attio uses API keys and OAuth 2.0 for authentication; SDK examples (npm/pypi) also show api_key usage.

credential_access.note: Pricing page advertises 'Start for free'. The Get Started docs (https://docs.attio.com/get-started) describe signup, dashboard onboarding and how to access API credentials, indicating developers can obtain credentials themselves after signup.

api_surface.note: The API reference overview page (meta/description) mentions 'endpoints, models, REST examples' and there are reference pages for product objects (e.g. Collections, People) showing multiple endpoints.

buildability.note: Public API docs exist and developers can obtain API keys via signup (free tier available). You can sign up for an account and generate API keys to start building.

queries: Attio API documentation site:attio.com OR site:docs.attio.com OR "Attio API" OR "Attio developer" OR "Attio developers" "API"
Attio "create API key" "dashboard" site:docs.attio.com OR site:attio.com "API key" "dashboard"
site:attio.com "API" "contact sales" OR "partner" OR "partnership" OR "enterprise" OR "paid plan" OR "requires"
